"C:\Program Files\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\how_unsigned_exe.dir/objects.a
C:\compilator\ucrt64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\how_unsigned_exe.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\how_unsigned_exe.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\compilator\ucrt64\bin\c++.exe -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\how_unsigned_exe.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o how_unsigned_exe.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libhow_unsigned_exe.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\how_unsigned_exe.dir\linkLibs.rsp
